programs.title: Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures
programs.desc: Kai faces his fears when spiders get loose in the temple.

programs.title: PJ Masks
programs.desc: Gekko is so anxious about facing a bullying villain, that he stays home one night to avoid her.

programs.desc: After learning about Backwards Day, where everything is reversed, Thomas and Percy cause trouble when misunderstandings lead to mistakes.

programs.desc: The Octonauts test drive the brand new Terra-Gup 2, a pangolin-inspired, armored gup, while rescuing creatures from a rockslide in the Rocky Mountains.

programs.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programs.desc: The elves and fairies arrive at Planet Bong and meet The Great Leader, the aliens and their pets. The Wise Old Elf has to make Planet Bong beautiful again by bringing back all the plants.

programs.title: Teletubbies
programs.desc: After it rains, the Teletubbies splash in the puddles outside.
